memory.test_plan: .claude/.sessionnotes/pr_test_plan.md — master test plan for PRs #20-#29 targeting joshuamyers-dev/sleeplab main. Covers automated and manual tests for each PR. Merge order: 20, 21, 22, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29.
